_comment: FORGE safety checklists for the PL45LM-class turn-mill. Authored from standard lockout/tagout (OSHA 1910.147-style) and machine-shop PPE practice, distilled into structured items. Each item requires the technician's spoken confirmation before the Safety_Agent advances — a hard human-in-the-loop checkpoint.

loto.title: Lockout / Tagout (LOTO)
loto.hazard: Stored electrical, hydraulic, pneumatic, and gravitational energy. Failure to isolate can cause crushing, amputation, or electrocution.

items.text: Notify affected personnel that the machine is being locked out.
items.prompt: Have you notified everyone in the cell? Say 'confirmed' to continue.

items.text: Press EMERGENCY STOP and move the machine to a safe, de-energized state.
items.prompt: Is the E-stop pressed and the machine stopped?

items.text: Open and lock the main electrical disconnect; apply your personal lock and tag.
items.prompt: Is your personal lock and tag on the main disconnect?

items.text: Bleed hydraulic and pneumatic pressure to zero (including through-spindle coolant).
items.prompt: Are hydraulic and pneumatic pressures at zero?

items.text: Block or lower any suspended axis to neutralize gravitational energy.
items.prompt: Is the Z-axis / head supported against drop?

items.text: Verify zero energy: attempt a normal start and confirm nothing moves or energizes.
items.prompt: Did you try-start and confirm zero energy? This is the verification step.

loto.completion: LOTO verified. The machine is safe to service. Re-energize only by reversing these steps.

ppe.title: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
ppe.hazard: Flying chips, coolant mist, sharp tooling, pinch points, and noise.

items.text: Safety glasses with side shields on.
No loose clothing, gloves removed near rotating spindle, long hair tied back.
items.prompt: Snag hazards controlled? Gloves off near the spindle?

items.text: Cut-resistant gloves available for chip and edge handling (off during machine motion).
items.prompt: Cut gloves on hand for handling?

items.text: Hearing protection if sustained noise is above the limit.
Steel-toe footwear and a clear, dry footing around the machine.

pre_start.title: Pre-start safety check
pre_start.hazard: Unexpected motion on power-up; tooling left in the work envelope.

items.text: Work envelope clear of tools, rags, and fixtures.
All guards and the spindle door in place and closed.
Way lube and coolant levels adequate.
E-stop functional and reset; nobody inside the cell.

pre_start.completion: Pre-start checks complete. Cleared to power and home the machine.
